availability_definition.value: no SLA / uptime not committed; Services provided 'AS-IS', no warranty of uninterrupted service

credit_regime.value: No service-level uptime credit regime. Only discretionary credits (coupons, promos, prepaid, fee adjustments) expiring 12 months from issuance; no tiers, no sole-remedy language for uptime.
credit_regime.citation: Lambda may, at its sole discretion, choose to offer credits

claim_mechanics.value: not specified (no SLA credit claim process; credits are discretionary and not claim-based)

sla_exclusions.value: No SLA exists. Related risk-shifting present: force majeure; customer fault/misuse; scheduled/emergency maintenance ('planned downtime for upgrades and maintenance'); beta/preview services; external network/ISP issues; throttling.
sla_exclusions.citation: temporarily suspend access to the Services during planned downtime for upgrades and maintenance

capacity_reservation.value: Public terms reference only Orders and published pricing; no reserved-instance, committed-use, take-or-pay or cancellation terms published. Meaningful commitment terms are negotiated, not published (per-Order).
capacity_reservation.citation: Each Order for the Services will describe additional mutually agreed-upon limitations

data_use_ai_training.value: No explicit AI/ML training statement. Provider may process Customer Property to provide Services and may use aggregated/anonymized 'Usage Information' to improve Services; no opt-out stated. Default: may use anonymized/aggregated data to improve services.
data_use_ai_training.citation: use data ... in an aggregated and anonymous manner ... improving the Services

suspension_rights.value: Grounds: breach of Agreement/AUP, non-payment, excessive utilization affecting availability, suspected unauthorized access, legal/court/regulatory requirement. Suspension may be immediate ('immediately suspend, throttle or terminate').
suspension_rights.citation: Lambda may immediately suspend, throttle or terminate access to the Services

termination.value: Termination for convenience: either party may terminate when no Orders in effect; for-cause with 30-day cure. Post-termination data retrieval: no window guaranteed — Lambda may delete Customer Property upon termination without liability.
termination.citation: Lambda may ... delete the Customer Property in its possession without liability

unilateral_modification.value: Lambda may update Agreement unilaterally; updated version binding at start of next billing cycle. (Website Terms: changes effective 10 days after posting.)
unilateral_modification.citation: updated version of this Agreement shall be binding upon the Parties at the start of the next billing cycle

governing_law_disputes.value: Governing law: California. Forum if not arbitrated: N.D. Cal. or Santa Clara County state court. Binding arbitration: yes (AAA, FAA; 30-day opt-out). Class-action waiver: yes.
governing_law_disputes.citation: The Parties agree to arbitrate all claims ... waiving ... class or representative action
